title: × Vandaenopsis ferrierensis
taxonomy: × Vandaenopsis ferrierensis is a natural hybrid orchid, derived from the cross between Vanda and Aerides. It is commonly known as the "Vanda Aerides" hybrid. This hybrid orchid is classified under the family Orchidaceae and the subfamily Epidendroideae. The classification is based on its parentage, morphology, and genetic characteristics. Further research and classification may be ongoing, but it is generally classified as a Vandaenopsis species.
